ticketTitle: Add GradeNA constant and Unsupported field to domain types to support the N/A short-circuit path

deliverables.planText: In internal/domain/dimension.go, add a new const block `const GradeNA Grade = -1` immediately after the existing iota-based Grade const block (after GradeF). Then add `GradeNA: "N/A"` to the gradeStrings map literal. Do not modify the existing iota block, GradeFromScore, or any other code.
deliverables.objective: Add GradeNA constant (-1) and "N/A" string mapping to domain grade types
nonGoals: Do NOT modify the existing iota-based Grade const block
Do NOT change GradeFromScore or any scoring logic
Do NOT touch downstream scorer, pipeline, or report files
Do NOT add any code that uses GradeNA — purely define the constant

deliverables.planText: In internal/domain/record.go, append `Unsupported bool \`json:"unsupported,omitempty"\`` to the CertificationRecord struct. Place it after the existing `Version` field (the last field in the struct). The zero-value default of `false` preserves all existing behavior.
deliverables.objective: Add Unsupported bool field to CertificationRecord struct for N/A short-circuit support
nonGoals: Do NOT update the recordJSON intermediate struct used for serialization
Do NOT add any logic that reads or sets the Unsupported field
Do NOT touch scorer, pipeline, or report files
Do NOT modify any existing struct fields or their ordering
